name: skilldeck
description: Local-first skill pack manager and verifier for agent instructions.

scripts.check: npm test && node src/cli.js validate test/fixtures/valid-skill --strict
scripts.smoke: node src/cli.js compat test/fixtures/valid-skill --target openclaw && node src/cli.js pack test/fixtures/valid-skill --out .tmp/valid.skillpack --force && node src/cli.js install .tmp/valid.skillpack --target-dir .tmp/install --force

author: Roger Chappel
